name: ᴅ|ᴅ ʏOᴜ M|SS ME⸮
description:
|꓄'S BEEN A WH|LE, HASN'꓄ |꓄⸮ ᴅEEPES꓄ APOLOG|ES FOR Mʏ ABSENcE.

No posts for 3 months. Wow. Almost like I died or something! Well I'm alive still, I just haven't had the motivation or desire to post anything new. I'm gonna start posting again I think, but nowhere near as much as before. I'm gonna finish up some bots I've been sitting on since forever now I think. I do have some ideas for the future, but I'm unsure. Feel free to leave any requests, if you have them. One other thing. I've kinda gotten super into die of death and forsaken, so don't be shocked if I end up making a bot for one of them. I've had a Two Time wip bot since around June I think. Maybe earlier. Expect something soon, friends.

Almost forgot something else. Uh. A lot of people have asked me to enable proxies, so I've decided to, yknow, do that. Sorry it took so long. I wasn't sure what enabling proxies meant but my Idiot daughter told me! Have fun :)
